message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding per-entry TTL support to cache layers (memory+disk) per PR spec

type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: I will add: ttl param to Cache.__init__ (end of signature) and configure_cache (end of signature), set_ttl() helper + Cache.set_ttl() method, TTLCache import; touching __init__/get/put bodies and __all__ list (appending set_ttl). Will edit now - please rebase/merge your compression+eviction params after, or shout if you're mid-edit.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Already edited Cache.__init__ (added compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy params + set_compression()/_encode_disk_value()/_decode_disk_value() methods) and wired get()/put() to use them; haven't touched __init__.py configure_cache yet. Please add your ttl param appended after mine in both signatures, and in get()/put() layer TTL logic around my _encode_disk_value/_decode_disk_value calls rather than replacing them, to avoid clobbering. I'll add my compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs to configure_cache next - shout if you're editing that function right now so we don't race.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Finished editing configure_cache(): added compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy kwargs (appended after enable_litellm_cache) and pass them as keyword args into Cache(...) call which now uses compress=compress, cull_limit=cull_limit, eviction_policy=eviction_policy. Please append your ttl kwarg after mine in the signature and add ttl=ttl to the Cache(...) call - using keyword args there should make merging conflict-free.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Done: added ttl param (last in both signatures), Cache.set_ttl() method, module-level set_ttl() helper exported in __all__, TTL-aware get()/put() logic and expire() lazy purge on miss. My changes don't overlap your compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy work since we appear to be in separate environments (my working tree only shows my diff, not yours) - each of us likely submits our own patch.txt independently, so no merge action needed on my end.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Compression feature complete and verified (roundtrip gzip/zlib, legacy fallback, size reduction, configure_cache params, existing tests pass). patch.txt written.
